user.title: TemperaturCrowd Configuration
user.description: Enter your Server URL and your email address to receive a magic verification link.

data.consent: I agree to the Data Protection Statement and consent to data collection.

wait_for_email.title: Verify your Email
wait_for_email.description: A magic link has been generated! Please check your server logs or your email inbox, and click the link to verify. After verifying, click 'Submit' or wait for the system to continue.

sensors.title: Select Sensors and Location
sensors.description: Select the temperature sensors you want to upload data for, and enter your postal code (to map to a broad climate region anonymously).

error.auth_failed: Failed to communicate with the server to request a link.
error.not_verified: The magic link has not been clicked yet. Please click it and try again.
error.poll_failed: Failed to poll the server for verification status.
error.consent_required: You must agree to the Data Protection Statement to continue.
